title: Cloud Architect
description: Design and manage robust cloud infrastructure and strategies. A Cloud Architect is responsible for overseeing a company's cloud computing strategy.
overview: A Cloud Architect is responsible for overseeing a company's cloud computing strategy, including cloud adoption plans, cloud application design, and cloud management and monitoring. Cloud architecture involves everything to do with cloud computing, including the front-end platforms, back-end platforms, a cloud-based delivery, and a network.
careerScope: Cloud Architects are among the highest-paid professionals in IT. Roles include Solutions Architect, Infrastructure Architect, and Cloud Consultant.

beginner.name: Cloud Fundamentals
beginner.desc: Understand SaaS, PaaS, IaaS and basic cloud concepts.

beginner.name: Networking Basics
beginner.desc: Master TCP/IP, DNS, VPC, and Subnetting.

intermediate.name: Core Service Mastery
intermediate.desc: In-depth knowledge of EC2, S3, RDS, and IAM on AWS/Azure/GCP.

intermediate.name: Infrastructure as Code
intermediate.desc: Automate infrastructure deployment using Terraform or CloudFormation.

advanced.name: Cloud Design Patterns
advanced.desc: Scalability, High Availability, and Disaster Recovery strategies.

advanced.name: Serverless & Microservices
advanced.desc: Architecting applications using Lambda, API Gateway, and Kubernetes.

advanced.name: Cloud Security & Compliance
advanced.desc: Implementing robust security controls and adhering to regulations.

projects.title: Multi-tier Scalable Web App
projects.description: Deploy a multi-tier web application with auto-scaling and load balancing.
